_comment: Product data — source of truth for the catalog. imageUrls verified HTTP 200 on Cloudinary.

_schema.category: must match exactly with Category.name in DB
_schema.costPrice: purchase/cost price (VND) — used for margin calculation in admin
_schema.description: product description shown on detail page
_schema.spec: typed spec object matching the corresponding spec table, null if none
